description:
This package installs the OpenSSL version of the Zabbix Agent MSI from the [pre-compiled files](https://www.zabbix.com/download_agents) supplied by [Zabbix LLC](https://www.zabbix.com/). The source code for this Chocolatey package can be found on [GitHub](https://github.com/zabbix/zabbix-agent-chocolatey). Please file any issues you find in the project's [Issue tracker](https://github.com/zabbix/zabbix-agent-chocolatey/issues).

## Package installation defaults
With the exception of SERVER, which is set to 127.0.0.1, the default settings of the MSI are used.

## Package Parameters
A full list of parameters is available in the [Zabbix documentation](https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/current/en/manual/installation/install_from_packages/win_msi#supported-parameters).

To pass parameters, use `--params "''"` (e.g. `choco install zabbix-agent.install --params="'/SERVER:zabbix.example.com /ENABLEPATH:1 /SKIP:fw'"`).

**Please note**: To have choco remember parameters on upgrade, be sure to set `choco feature enable -n=useRememberedArgumentsForUpgrades`.
summary: The Zabbix Agent is used in conjunction with a Zabbix Server for monitoring a system.
author: Zabbix LLC
